igbo: Aga m arụ ọrụ m n'afọ ikpeazụ
english: I will work on my final year project

igbo: Isiokwu oru ngo m bu ntụgharị asụsụ igwe
english: My project topic is machine translation

igbo: Anyi na-eji ọgụgụ isi arụ ọrụ ntụgharị asụsụ
english: We use artificial intelligence for translation

igbo: Asụsụ Igbo bụ asụsụ nwere obere data
Nchọpụta a na-elekwasị anya na asụsụ Igbo
english: This research focuses on the Igbo language
We are building a translation system
This system uses a neural network
We are collecting data for research

igbo: Data dị mkpa maka ịzụlite model
english: Data is important for training a model

igbo: A na-eji dataset a zụọ model
english: This dataset is used to train a model
We will evaluate the model performance

igbo: BLEU score na-atụ ogo ntụgharị asụsụ
Anyi jiri BLEU score nyochaa model
english: We used BLEU score to evaluate the model

igbo: Iterative back translation na-enyere aka imezi model
english: Iterative back translation helps improve the model

igbo: Data synthetic na-eme ka dataset buru ibu
Anyi jikọtara data ọhụrụ na data mbụ
english: We combined new data with the original data

igbo: Model ọhụrụ karịrị nke mbụ arụmọrụ
english: The new model outperformed the previous one

igbo: Natural Language Processing bụ akụkụ AI
english: Natural Language Processing is a branch of AI

igbo: Anyi na-amụ NLP n'ime oru ngo a
english: We study NLP in this project

igbo: Neural Machine Translation na-eji deep learning
english: Neural Machine Translation uses deep learning

igbo: Model ahụ mụtara site na ọtụtụ atụ
english: The model learned from many examples
We cleaned the dataset before training

igbo: Anyi kewara dataset n'ime train na test
english: We split the dataset into train and test sets

igbo: Data validation nyere aka nyochaa model
english: Validation data helped evaluate the model

igbo: Anyi jiri GPU mee ọzụzụ model
english: We used a GPU to train the model

igbo: Model ahụ nwere ike ịtụgharị Igbo gaa Bekee
english: The model can translate Igbo to English

igbo: Model ahụ nwekwara ike ịtụgharị Bekee gaa Igbo
english: The model can also translate English to Igbo
We will improve the model in the future

igbo: Nchọpụta a bara uru nye mmepe asụsụ Igbo
english: This research is useful for Igbo language development

igbo: Asụsụ mpaghara kwesịrị inweta nkwado teknụzụ
Nchọpụta a na-enyere nchekwa asụsụ aka
